title: Ability to hide the "add to conversation" bubble
excerpt: While in presentation mode, I would like to be able to hide the blue “add to conversation” bubble. When displaying on a TV, the screen space is finite, so removing any non-essential view options would be valuable.  Remov…

posts.author: ssawyer (sean)
posts.cookedHtml: While in presentation mode, I would like to be able to hide the blue “add to conversation” bubble. When displaying on a TV, the screen space is finite, so removing any non-essential view options would be valuable. Removing these mandatory options would allow for more space to be diverted to other columns.
